consistency_check.name: Consistent with established ruleset (D&D 5e Paladin feature).
consistency_check.level_mapping: Level 2 feature aligns with the official rules.
consistency_check.subclass_status: Correctly marked as not a subclass feature.

quality_assessment.description_completeness: The description is highly detailed and captures all core mechanics (trigger, resource cost, base damage scaling, maximum damage, and conditional bonus damage).
quality_assessment.formatting_notes: The damage scaling logic (2d8 for 1st, +1d8 per slot level above 1st, max 5d8) is accurately represented.

mechanics_review.base_damage_formula: 2d8 (1st slot) + 1d8 per slot level above 1st (up to 5th level slot resulting in 5d8 total).
mechanics_review.conditional_bonus: Applies if the target is Undead or Fiend (extra 1d8 damage).

suggested_improvements: None. The data accurately reflects the official feature text.
